{"problem_standardized_math":"Verify that the KKT conditions for the bound-constrained optimization problem\n\\[\n\\min_{x\\in\\mathbf{R}^n} \\phi(x) \\qquad \\text{subject to } l\\le x\\le u\n\\]\nare equivalent to the compact condition\n\\[\nx - P(x-\\nabla\\phi(x),l,u)=0,\n\\]\nwhere the projection operator onto the rectangular box \\([l,u]\\) is defined componentwise by\n\\[\nP(g,l,u)_i=\n\\begin{cases}\nl_i, & \\text{if } g_i\\le l_i,\\\\\ng_i, & \\text{if } g_i\\in (l_i,u_i),\\\\\nu_i, & \\text{if } g_i\\ge u_i,\n\\end{cases}\n\\qquad i=1,2,\\ldots,n.\n\\]"}
